member.office_address: 142 Russell Senate Office Building Washington DC 20510

form_analysis.form_instructions_text: Please fill out this form to receive updates from Senator Fetterman's office regarding the annual Congressional appropriation process.

fields.label: What is your first and last name?
What is the name of your organization?
What county in Pennsylvania are you or your organization located?
Are you interested in making a CDS funding request, a programmatic request, or both?
fields.rationale: The pre-computed reference values explicitly state that this is a programmatic funding request for NASA's Science Mission Directorate.

top_contracts.description: Swift ultraviolet&optical telescopes x-ray telescope, ground station system
top_contracts.generated_award_summary: Sustaining the Swift multi-wavelength observatory operations.

top_contracts.description: The contractor shall fabricate long lead hardware for primary moonranger components, create mission plan, revise architectures for navigation and autonomy, release beta version of mission navigation and autonomy software modules.
top_contracts.generated_award_summary: Fabricating moonranger hardware and developing navigation autonomy software.

top_contracts.description: The purpose of this procurement is for liquid nitrogen and liquid oxygen.
top_contracts.generated_award_summary: Supplying essential liquid oxygen and nitrogen propellants.

top_contracts.description: This delivery order renews maintenance and support for perpetual autocad software licenses in-use at multiple centers and for agency wide thermal desktop and thermal desktop solver engineering software licenses. Quotes are listed below.
top_contracts.generated_award_summary: Sustaining agency-wide access to critical CAD and thermal modeling tools.

top_contracts.description: Bulk liquid nitrogen kennedy space center base contract 80ksc024da013   clin 002 NASA GRC and atf task order
top_contracts.generated_award_summary: Contracting bulk liquid nitrogen logistics at Kennedy Space Center

top_grants.description: We propose to build an x-ray coded aperture telescope (BLACKCAT) designed for observations of.bright x-ray sources in the 0.5-20 kev band..
top_grants.generated_award_summary: Building the BLACKCAT x-ray telescope for observing bright cosmic sources.

top_grants.generated_award_summary: Creating advanced CMOS sensors for high-speed X-ray observation.

top_grants.description: X ray reflection gratings key developments for the next decade
top_grants.generated_award_summary: Developing key components for future X-ray space telescopes.
